title: conradia scabra
intro: Conradia scabra, also known as prickly gland flower, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia, characterized by its unique, hairy, and prickly appearance. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Conradia scabra include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
